name: Kindergarten Individual Sports & Fitness — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for movement choices, balance, effort, and personal goals. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with movement choices, balance, effort, and personal goals.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about movement choices, balance, effort, and personal goals.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

activities.title: A close look at movement choices, balance, effort, and personal goals
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at movement choices, balance, effort, and personal goals, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in movement choices, balance, effort, and personal goals.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
